steps.title: Set up the substitution for f(0)
steps.content: To find $f(0)$, substitute $x = 0$ into the function: $$f(0) = 10(0)^2 - 38(0) - 150$$

steps.title: Evaluate each term
steps.content: Any term with a factor of 0 equals 0, so $10(0)^2 = 0$, $-38(0) = 0$, and $-150$ remains. Combining these: $$f(0) = 0 + 0 - 150 = -150$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
